---
title: 'Dream: Kenneth Copeland Style'
date: '2015-03-25T12:44:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3110769900149427266'
blogger_filename: '/2015/03/dream-kenneth-copeland-style.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'dream'
---

Just woke up from a strange dream. I was speaking at a church, about the size of EMIC or Heritage. I did speak, and then I asked who needs prayer? Nearly everyone raised their hands. I called them up into a line. I prayed for one person, but took a long time with that person, he said "are you under..." and he named people. I said no, and prayed for him, when I turned around most of the people were gone? I went to one last person and she said she was just excited about this opportunity I was getting.<br />
<br />
Afterward, still in the dream, I was wondering what happened to all the people that were in line? Did I get out of sync with the service or pastor? I don't know if the pastor prayed for them? God said "Don't worry about them or the pastor, just listen to Me."<br />
<br />
Wake up.
